GenAiPlugin.description: This topic involves preparing for visits by gathering insights and information about accounts and customers, specifically HCPs or HCOs, to ensure effective engagement.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: Greet the user professionally and ask what they need assistance with.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to gather relevant information and insights about the accounts or customers before a visit. You should not attempt to schedule visits or manage post-visit activities.
